Earn mode

Everything in your garage can pay you back

Camera gear, power tools, camping equipment — someone nearby needs it today. List it in 3 minutes.

Passive income

Earn while you sleep

List once. Renters book and pay through Stripe. You get notified. Item goes out, money comes in.

How it works

Three steps to your first rental

1

Snap & list

Photo → AI fills title, category, and suggests the right price. Under 3 minutes from photo to live listing.

2

Renter books & pays

Stripe payment, insurance added automatically, identity verified on both sides. You get notified instantly.

3

QR handoff & earn

Renter scans QR on pickup, scans again on return. Every timestamp is legal evidence. Payout hits your account.

Four modes

One item.
Four ways to offer it.

Daily income

Daily, weekly, monthly. Insured every time.

One-time sale

Direct purchase. No insurance needed.

Monthly payments

They pay monthly, own it at the end.

Give freely

No charge. No commission. Just goodwill.

Trust & safety

Built so strangers can trust each other

Identity verified

Stripe Identity — government ID + selfie. One-time per account.

Insured by Safely

Every rental covered against damage or loss. Automatic, no extra steps.

QR tracking

Scan in, scan out. Every timestamp is legal evidence in a dispute.

Blind reviews

Both sides review independently. Published only when both submit.

For travelers

Traveling?
Rent locally.

Don't pack it all. Search by city, find verified owners, insured rentals wherever you land.

No shipping. No hassle. Just rent what you need, where you are.

At home

Need it for a weekend? Rent it.

Why buy when your neighbor has it? Browse verified listings, pay with Stripe, pick up the same day.

Meet Mr. Rentano

Your AI guide.
Always on.

No support tickets. No hold music. No waiting.

🕐 24/7 🌍 Any language 🎙️ Voice or text
Listing help
"Your listing is live. Want me to write a TikTok caption for it?"
Dispute support
"The renter hasn't returned the item. Want to open a dispute? I'll guide you through it."
En español
"¡Tu artículo ya está publicado. ¡Empecemos a ganar!"
По-русски
"Арендатор не вернул вещь. Хочешь открыть спор? Я проведу тебя по каждому шагу."

Speaks your language — any language

Arabic, Chinese, French, Hindi, Portuguese, Japanese and more.
Text or voice — your choice.

Everyone wins

Owners earn.
Renters save.
Travelers explore.

One platform, three roles. Switch between them anytime.

Install in seconds

Add to your home screen

No app store. No download. Works like a native app.

iPhone / iPad
iOS 16.4 or later
1

Open allbyrent.com in Safari

Must be Safari — Chrome won't show the install option

2

Tap the Share button

The square with an arrow pointing up — bottom center of Safari

3

Tap "Add to Home Screen"

Scroll down in the share sheet if you don't see it

4

Tap "Add" — done

AllByRent icon appears on your home screen

Android
Chrome browser
1

Open allbyrent.com in Chrome

Chrome will detect the PWA automatically

2

Tap the banner or three-dot menu

"Install AllByRent" banner may appear automatically at the bottom

3

Tap "Add to Home screen"

In the three-dot menu if banner didn't appear

4

Tap "Install" — done

Works like a native app — full screen, no browser bar

No storage used. No updates needed. Always the latest version.

No app store needed

Open and install.
That's it.

No Apple tax. No Google cut. Add to home screen in one tap.

iOS 16.4+ · Android · any browser
